translationDisclaimer: Iyi mpinduro itanzwe ku bw'ubwiza bwawe. Mu gihe cy'amakimbirane, verisiyo y'Icyongereza y'iyi politiki ni yo izakurikizwa.
privacyDataWeCollect: BicycleRepairStations.com ntisaba konti z'abakoresha kandi ntikusanya amakuru y'umuntu ku giti cye. Nta makuru y'ubucuruzi (cookies) akoreshwa. Ibikorwa by'imikoreshereze n'imikorere bidafite amazina bikurwa binyuze muri Vercel Analytics na Vercel Speed Insights, harimo n'ibikorwa by'ikoranabuhanga nk'ibikorwa byo gusangira.
privacyLocation: Niba wemeye gutanga aho uri, aho uri hakoreshwa gusa kugira ngo ikarita igaragare neza no gushaka sitasiyo ziri hafi. Aho uri ntabwo byigeze byoherezwa kuri seriveri zacu — bikorwa byose muri mushakisha wawe kandi bikavaho igihe ufunze porogaramu.
privacyIpGeolocation: Igihe geolocation ya mushakisha yanciwe cyangwa idahari, porogaramu ikoresha aderesi yawe ya IP kugira ngo imenye aho uri hafi kugira ngo ikarita igaragare hafi yawe kandi ururimi n'igipimo by'intera bisaburwe. Iyi mikorere ishingiye ku nyungu zemewe (GDPR Art. 6(1)(f)). IP ikorwa na Vercel edge function; nta deresi ya IP ibikwa cyangwa yandikwa n'iyi porogaramu. Ushobora guhindura ururimi n'igipimo byawe igihe icyo ari cyo cyose mu ibaruramenu ry'igenamiterere.
privacyLocalStorage: Igenamiterere ryawe (igipimo cy'intera, isura, ururimi) ribikwa mu bubiko bw'aho hantu bwa mushakisha wawe kugira ngo bikomeze hagati y'ingendo. Aya makuru ntabwo yigera ava ku cyuma cyawe.
privacySharing: Niba ukoresha ibikoresho byo gusangira bya porogaramu, amahuza ashobora kuba arimo ibipimo by'iyamamaza (urugero, source/medium/campaign tags) kugira ngo inkomoko z'ibinyabiziga zibare hamwe. Ibikubiye mu myandikire wihitiyemo gusangira bishyirwa na wewe ku buryo butaziguye kuri sitansiyo, porogaramu, cyangwa serivisi y'imeri yatoranijwe hakurikijwe amategeko y'ibanga bya serivisi yayo.
privacyThirdParty: Amashusho y'ikarita akurwa kuri CARTO, ESRI, Stadia Maps, na seriveri za OpenStreetMap. Aba batanga serivisi bashobora kwandika aderesi yawe ya IP nk'igice cy'imikorere isanzwe ya seriveri. Amakuru ya sitasiyo akurwa kuri Overpass API. Gushakisha ahantu bikoreshwa na Nominatim geocoding. Ibikorwa by'urupapuro, imikorere, n'ibikorwa bidafite amazina bikurwa na Vercel Analytics na Vercel Speed Insights. Igihe uhisemo gusangira, amahuza ashobora gufungurwa mu mbuga z'abandi (urugero, X, Facebook, abatanga imeri, cyangwa intego zo gusangira z'igikoresho). Nyamuneka reba politiki y'ibanga n'amategeko bya buri mutanga serivisi ku bisobanuro birambuye.
privacyChildren: Iyi serivisi ntiyerekewe abana bari munsi y'imyaka 13. Ntidukusanya amakuru y'abana tubimenye.
privacyContact: Ibibazo ku iyi politiki bishobora koherezwa ku aderesi igaragara kuri BicycleRepairStations.com.
termsAcceptance: Mu gukoresha BicycleRepairStations.com wemera aya mategeko. Niba utemera, nyamuneka hagarika gukoresha serivisi.
termsService: Iyi porogaramu igufasha gushaka sitasiyo rusange zo gusana amagare zanditswe muri OpenStreetMap. Irimo kandi ibikoresho byo gusangira amahuza ya porogaramu binyuze mu nzira z'umuntu ku giti cye. Serivisi itangwa ku buntu nk'igikoresho cy'ubufasha ku batwara amagare.
termsAccuracy: Amakuru ya sitasiyo aturuka muri OpenStreetMap, ububiko bw'amakuru buhindurwa n'abaturage. Amakuru ashobora kuba adatuzuye, adahari neza, cyangwa ashaje. Buri gihe menya neza ko sitasiyo ibaho kandi ikora mbere yo kuyikoresha. Ntidufata inshingano ku sitasiyo zibura, zamarikiwe nabi, cyangwa zivanyweho.
termsSharing: Niba ukoresha ibiranga gusangira, ufite inshingano y'ibyo utangaza n'aho ubitangaza. Ntukoreshe serivisi mu kohereza spam, gutoteza, cyangwa gutangaza ibikubiye bidemewe n'amategeko. Ufite inshingano yo gukurikiza amategeko ya buri mbuga y'abandi ukoresha.
termsWarranty: Serivisi itangwa "uko iri" nta garanti iyo ari yo yose, uko bigaragara cyangwa bihishwe. Ntidutanga icyizere ku gihe cy'imikorere, ukuri, cyangwa ubushobozi bw'intego iyo ari yo yose.
termsLiability: Ku rugero runini remewe n'amategeko, BicycleRepairStations.com n'abakora ibyo ntibazira ibihombo byose bifatika, bidafatika, bibaye ku mpanuka, cyangwa biva mu gukoresha cyangwa kutabasha gukoresha serivisi.
termsThirdParty: Amashusho y'ikarita, amakuru ya sitasiyo, ibisubizo bya geocoding, n'intego zo gusangira bitangwa n'abandi. Amategeko yabo akoreshwa.
termsChanges: Dushobora guhindura aya mategeko igihe icyo ari cyo cyose. Gukomeza gukoresha serivisi nyuma y'impinduka bigaragaza kwemera amategeko ahindutse.
